calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-05-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 to place the Settlement Agreement of the parties on the record. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Sophia Andritsakis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A.
Defendant Clifford Arnett, sued as Arnett Clifford, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 29, 2010.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. Andritsakis. According to the terms of the agreement, defendant Clifford Arnett, sued as Arnett Clifford, shall pay plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A. the sum of $200.00 per month on the eighteenth of each month, commencing December 18, 2010, and continuing until the outstanding balance of $4,711.53 is paid in full. If the eighteenth of the month falls on a weekend or holiday, defendant's payment shall be due the next business day. If defendant Clifford Arnett, sued as Arnett Clifford complies with the terms of this agreement, plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A. shall dismiss the action, with prejudice. Defendant shall have a five day grace period in which to cure any failure to adhere to this payment schedule.

If defendant Clifford Arnett, sued as Arnett Clifford, does not comply with the terms of the agreement set forth above, plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A. may, upon ex parte application with forty-eights notice to defendant, obtain judgment for the entire balance, minus any payments made by defendant to plaintiff.

Each party shall bear their own attorney fees. Defendant Clifford Arnett, sued as Arnett Clifford, was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the settlement agreement.

Agreement of the parties was adopted by the Court. Matter is CONTINUED to February 5, 2013 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
